Localization.Description: Adding user to a distribution group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An error while adding user {subject.account.name} to distribution group "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} added user {object.account.name} to distribution group "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} was added to distribution group "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
